name: Roast Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Mix all ingredients except catsup and brown sugar in a large bowl.
3. Press the mixture firmly into an ungreased loaf pan, 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2 inches.
4. Loosen the edges with a spatula and transfer the loaf to an ungreased baking pan, 13 x 9 x 2 inches.
5. Mix catsup and brown sugar separately, then spoon over the loaf.
6. Bake uncovered for about 1 to 1 1/4 hours.
7. Remove meat loaf to a plate and let stand for 10 minutes before slicing and serving on a heated platter.
